device.backend: official Android ARM64 Q4 CPU runner

unique_transcripts: Can you help me come up with a slogan for my woodworking site business?

The stale smell of old beer lingers. It takes heat to bring out the odor. A cold dip restores health and zest. A salt pickle tastes fine with ham. Tacos al pastor are my favorite. A zestful food is the hot cross bun.

Sure, how about something like “Crafting Your Dream Home,” “Handcrafted Woodworking: Your Source for Quality,” or “Turning Wood into Home Magic.” Each of these highlights the quality and creativity of your work.

cpu_probe.method: Delta of /proc/<pid>/stat user+system ticks around each request
cpu_probe.note: Separate probe on a reused persistent chat session; response length and total latency are not directly comparable with the primary fixed-output chat workload.
